identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.
anti_patterns: No web-only CSS properties in React Native (e.g., hover, grid-template-areas).

layout.safe_area: ALWAYS wrap screens in SafeAreaView or use useSafeAreaInsets.

bottom_tabs.style: bg-white/90 blur-xl border-t border-stone-100 absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 elevation-0

grid_system.bento_dashboard: Use flex-wrap with percentage widths (e.g., w-[48%]) + gap-4 to simulate grid.
grid_system.scroll: Use ScrollView with contentContainerStyle={{ paddingBottom: 100 }} to avoid tab bar overlap.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 active:bg-indigo-700 py-4 px-8 rounded-full shadow-lg shadow-indigo-500/30 flex-row items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-stone-200 active:bg-stone-50 py-4 px-8 rounded-full shadow-sm flex-row items-center justify-center gap-2

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 p-5 shadow-sm active:scale-98 transition-transform

inputs.default: bg-stone-50 border border-stone-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-4 text-stone-900 font-medium placeholder:text-stone-400 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:bg-white transition-colors
inputs.label: text-sm font-semibold text-stone-700 mb-2 ml-1

chips.item: bg-stone-100 px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-stone-200

restaurant.desc: Modern restaurant interior with bar and dining tables

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: This is a React Native Expo project. DO NOT use HTML elements (div, span, h1). Use View, Text, ScrollView, TouchableOpacity, Image.
NAVIGATION: Use 'expo-router'. File based routing in /app/frontend/app/.
SafeArea: Always respect safe area insets. Use 'react-native-safe-area-context'.
Testing: Add testID='...' to all interactive elements.
Animation: Use 'react-native-reanimated' for complex animations or LayoutAnimation for simple layout changes.
Avoid 'grid-cols-*' classes as React Native doesn't support CSS Grid fully. Use Flexbox.
For the 'Bento' grid on Home, use two columns with flex-wrap: wrap.
Ensure 'PostSnap' branding uses the 'Electric Indigo' (#4F46E5) primary color.
The Create Flow is a 2-step process. Step 1: Input text/image. Step 2: Preview & Platform toggle.
Paywall Modal must be accessible from Settings and triggerable on restricted features.
Implement 'Gemini Flash' stub/mock for AI Caption Generation if API key is missing, but structure the service for it.
Implement 'Nano Banana' stub/mock for AI Image Processing if API key is missing.

universal_guidelines.interaction: Every tap must provide feedback (opacity change or scale).
universal_guidelines.spacing_rule: Use double spacing (p-6, p-8) for 'breathing room' on mobile.
universal_guidelines.typography_rule: Never use pure black text. Use slate-900.
